title: Sound System Donation & Cylch Meithrin Twtil and Ysgol Santes Helen admissions – Caernarfon
body:
Generous Donation Recieved

We are delighted to share that our Parish has recieved a geneorous donation via Gift aid of £5000 from a couple, dedicated to upgrading our sound system. This gift will cover the essential must-have improvements. We still need £2000 for a hearing loop system; safety rack; additional microphones and other improvements. Every gift large or small makes a difference. If you are a UK tax payer, please use the print form or online form to gift aid the donation and make it go further at no extra cost to you. Together, we can ensure that every voice is heard and every word builds our faith family.

Cylch Meithrin Twtil and Ysgol Santes Helen admissions – Caernarfon

Ysgol Santes Helen is a Catholic primary school for children aged 3–11. Places are available. Email pennaeth@santeshelen.ysgoliongwynedd.cymru or call 01286 674856. Cylch Meithrin Twtil is a pre-school playgroup located within the school, welcoming children from 2 years old. Sessions run from 11.00 am–3.00 pm. Contact: Email : cylchmeithrintwtil@gmail.com or call 07587 537609.
